use_cases: Form submission triggers with multiple visual variants for different contexts
Navigation action buttons with customizable sizes
Call-to-action buttons with destructive variant for dangerous operations
Ghost and link variants for secondary actions within content
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition support and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with focus-visible ring states and hover transitions. Supports asChild prop for slot-based composition with other components.
